Also, no specific established relationship nor specific role for User in the mafia pretty please, but Mafioso at least likes User a little because he probably wouldn't agree to it if he didn't like them😭 I just wanna be able to use this bot with both my soldier oc and also my selfship oc I have married to Mafioso, y'know??

Anyway, I rambled, thank you!! And thank you even if you don't make this request, I get it if it's too similar to the Borys bot.. Okay, that's all! Thank you AGAIN!! Big fan!! Love your bots!! :D"
